---
title: "sv_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\sv_engine.py"
loc: 90
complexity: 5
logic_score: 5.95
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 4.25
---

## Intent
The `sv_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignEngine, __init__, run, teardown, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignEngine, __init__, run, teardown, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 96 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core](file://src.core)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.context](file://src.core.engine.context)
- [src.core.engine.injector](file://src.core.engine.injector)
- [src.core.engine.executor](file://src.core.engine.executor)
- [src.core.engine.reporter](file://src.core.engine.reporter)
- [src.core.engine.builder](file://src.core.engine.builder)
- [src.core.engine.orchestrator](file://src.core.engine.orchestrator)

### Exports
- `SovereignEngine`
- `__init__`
- `run`
- `teardown`
- `main`
